TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Nikol_Pashinyan, title = Nikol_Pashinyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nikol_Pashinyan} }

S.FORM: == satangahan == Nikol Pashinyan u pilecuhan niza i Ijevan, Armenian SSR, Soviet Union. 2 bulad 9 demiad 1967 a mihcan nalecuhan. u cunli nu Armenia ayza sa ci Nikol Pashinyan, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcan 5 bulad 8 demiad. u ngangan niza u sulit tu ngangan nu Armenia a kamu:’Ü’ę’Į’ł’¨ ’ď’°’∑’ę’∂’Ķ’°’∂ u sulit tu ngangan nu Amilika a kamu:Nikol Pashinyan u sulit tu ngangan nu Hulam a kamu:ŚįľÁßĎÁąĺ¬∑ŚłēŤĺõśŹö u sulit tu ngangan nu Sakizaya a kamu:NikeelÔľéPasinyan kakuniza
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == nikor~…ĺ pasńßinjan u pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan niza i ij…ô*an, arm…ônian ss*, so*i…ôt union. * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶an nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u ¶unr~…ĺi nu arm…ônia ajza sa ¶i nikor~…ĺ pasńßinjan, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶an * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. u ŇčaŇčan niza u sur~…ĺit tu ŇčaŇčan nu arm…ônia a kamu:***** ******** u sur~…ĺit tu ŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika a kamu:nikor~…ĺ pasńßinjan u sur~…ĺit tu ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:******* u sur~…ĺit tu ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja a kamu:nik…ô…ôr~…ĺ*pasinjan kakuniza
S.FORM: == satangahan == Nikol Pashinyan u pilecuhan niza i Ijevan, Armenian SSR, Soviet Union. 2 bulad 9 demiad 1967 a mihcan nalecuhan. u cunli nu Armenia ayza sa ci Nikol Pashinyan, micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcan 5 bulad 8 demiad. u ngangan niza u sulit tu ngangan nu Armenia a kamu:’Ü’ę’Į’ł’¨ ’ď’°’∑’ę’∂’Ķ’°’∂ u sulit tu ngangan nu Amilika a kamu:Nikol Pashinyan u sulit tu ngangan nu Hulam a kamu:ŚįľÁßĎÁąĺ¬∑ŚłēŤĺõśŹö u sulit tu ngangan nu Sakizaya a kamu:NikeelÔľéPasinyan kakuniza
